article_meta.title: — News —Trump Honors Veterans At Arlington With Tales Of Valor, Courage, And Patriotism"America stands tall because Amer

reasoning: The summary largely maintains neutral, attributed language and avoids adopting the article’s celebratory rhetoric. It attributes claims to Trump and reports actions without endorsing them. Minor interpretive phrasing (e.g., “heroes,” “national unity”) appears but does not shift the tone to partisan or loaded framing.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs like “delivered,” “expressed,” “announced,” and “stated” rather than loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Contested or promotional claims (e.g., VA backlog reduction) are attributed to Trump.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Slightly interpretive phrases (e.g., “themes of national unity,” calling subjects “heroes”) but overall not presented as objective judgments.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarmist or hyped language beyond summarizing the speech’s content.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks introduced by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No attributions of motives or internal states beyond quoted/attributed statements.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the one-sided nature of the source without inventing counter-perspectives.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits a notable element from the speech (the stated renaming of the Department of Defense to the Department of War), which likely qualifies as a key fact.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Minimal and context-appropriate; largely tied to the subject of the speech.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Tone mirrors the source without undue emphasis on negative elements.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential deference to elites beyond reporting the presidency as the source.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Significantly more neutral than the source’s laudatory framing, with minor residual interpretive wording.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Accurately represents the sole perspective in the article (Trump’s speech) without adding or omitting other viewpoints.
